tracks.rawText: 2:47DABSSS - MDFv5.5CoverAggressive dubstep at 140 BPM with a brutal half-time drop, detuned growling basses, FM wobble leads, and a seismic 808 sub with heavy sidechain, Punchy snare cracks, metallic percussion, risers, reverse hits, and distorted synth brass build a savage, oversized mix with gritty noise layers and wide stereo automationPublishRemix
tracks.title: DABSSS - MDF

tracks.rawText: 5:07DABSSS - MDFUploadHardcore Techno with Speedcore and Gabber influences, The track features a distorted, high-velocity kick drum with a heavy transient and long, saturated decay, A high-pitched, staccato synth lead plays a repetitive, chromatic melody, Aggressive, shouted male vocal samples are processed with distortion and rhythmic gating, The arrangement includes rapid-fire snare rolls, glitchy breakbeat chops, and sudden silence gaps for rhythmic emphasis, The tempo is 200 BPM, The track utilizes heavy sidechain compression and bitcrushing on the percussion, Synthesized risers and white noise sweeps transition between sectionsPublishRemix
tracks.title: DABSSS - MDF

tracks.rawText: 3:28The Saboteur： Don't Do Me Wrong - Kacee Clanton [FDTjGwmGva0]v5.5CoverModern pop with clean electric guitar shuffle rhythm, punchy bass, and tight live drums opening the mix, Bright female lead vocals upfront, harmonica fills between lines, glossy layered chorus harmonies, subtle synth pads, and a radio-ready top end with crisp compression, light slapback delay, and a driving midtempo grooveAliciakePublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:38Cocktail Party [-8tSJfjPn9U]v5.5CoverLo-fi hip hop, A detuned, warbling electric piano plays a jazz-influenced chord progression with a heavy vinyl crackle and hiss layer, The drum kit features a muffled, low-pass filtered kick and a crisp, dry snare with a slight swing, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the root notes of the piano, A recurring melodic motif is played on a muted, plucked nylon string guitar with high reverb, The tempo is 85 BPM in the key of C minor, The arrangement is minimalist, focusing on a repetitive four-bar loop with subtle variations in the percussion velocityPublishRemix
tracks.title: Cocktail Party [-8tSJfjPn9U]
